name: Etherscan
description: Etherscan is the leading blockchain explorer, search, API and analytics platform for Ethereum, a decentralized smart contracts platform.

name: Blockscout
description: Blockscout is an open-source blockchain explorer for Ethereum-based networks. It provides a comprehensive, easy-to-use interface for searching the blockchain and viewing transactions, blocks, addresses, and token transfers.
networks: Ethereum, Gnosis Chain, Ethereum Classic, Base, Optimism, Arbitrum One, Polygon, zkSync Era, Scroll, Linea, and more

name: Mempool.space
description: Mempool.space is an open-source Bitcoin block explorer and mempool visualizer. It provides real-time data on Bitcoin transactions, blocks, fees, and network statistics.

name: Blockchain.com Explorer
description: Blockchain.com Explorer is one of the oldest and most visited Bitcoin block explorers, providing data on Bitcoin transactions, blocks, and wallet addresses.

name: BscScan
description: BscScan is the leading blockchain explorer for BNB Smart Chain, providing detailed information on transactions, smart contracts, tokens, and wallet activity.

name: Solscan
description: Solscan is a user-friendly and real-time Solana blockchain explorer providing insights into transactions, accounts, tokens, and programs on the Solana network.

name: Solana Explorer
description: Solana Explorer is the official block explorer maintained by Solana Foundation for inspecting transactions, accounts, blocks, and programs on the Solana network.

name: Avascan
description: Avascan is the premier blockchain explorer for Avalanche, covering the C-Chain, X-Chain, P-Chain, and all Avalanche subnets.

name: SnowScan
description: SnowScan is a block explorer and analytics platform for the Avalanche C-Chain, operated by Etherscan.

name: Polygonscan
description: Polygonscan is the leading blockchain explorer for the Polygon PoS network, offering transaction lookups, smart contract verification, and token analytics.

name: CardanoScan
description: CardanoScan is a blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the Cardano network, supporting ADA transactions, staking, NFTs, and native tokens.

name: Adastat
description: Adastat is an alternative Cardano blockchain explorer providing statistics on blocks, transactions, pools, and native assets.

name: Tronscan
description: Tronscan is the official block explorer for the TRON blockchain, providing data on transactions, blocks, accounts, smart contracts, and DeFi activity.

name: SonicScan
description: SonicScan is the leading blockchain explorer for the Sonic network, an EVM-compatible Layer-1 blockchain formerly known as Fantom. Powered by Etherscan, it provides comprehensive data on transactions, blocks, addresses, tokens, and smart contracts on the Sonic chain.

name: NearBlocks
description: NearBlocks is a blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the NEAR Protocol, offering insights into transactions, accounts, tokens, and smart contracts.

name: Allo.info
description: Allo.info is a blockchain explorer for the Algorand network, providing data on transactions, accounts, assets, and applications.

name: Mintscan
description: Mintscan is a multi-chain blockchain explorer for the Cosmos ecosystem, covering the Cosmos Hub and all IBC-connected chains.

name: Subscan
description: Subscan is a high-precision blockchain explorer for Substrate-based networks, covering Polkadot, Kusama, and all parachains.

name: Stellar Expert
description: Stellar.Expert is an advanced blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the Stellar network, supporting transactions, accounts, assets, and DEX activity.

name: XRPScan
description: XRPScan is a blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the XRP Ledger, providing data on transactions, accounts, tokens, and DEX activity.

name: Bithomp
description: Bithomp is a blockchain explorer for the XRP Ledger focused on account lookups, username resolution, NFTs, and payment history.

name: TzKT
description: TzKT is an open-source, high-performance blockchain explorer and API for the Tezos network, supporting transactions, smart contracts, tokens, and baking data.

name: Blockscout (ETC)
description: Blockscout is the official open-source block explorer for Ethereum Classic, providing full visibility into transactions, blocks, and smart contracts.

name: HashScan
description: HashScan is the official explorer for the Hedera network, providing data on transactions, tokens, smart contracts, and network consensus.

name: Aptos Explorer
description: Aptos Explorer is the official block explorer maintained by Aptos Labs for browsing transactions, accounts, tokens, and modules on the Aptos blockchain.

name: SuiVision
description: SuiVision is the most widely used block explorer for the Sui blockchain, providing detailed views of transactions, objects, accounts, and packages.

name: Seitrace
description: Seitrace is the official block explorer for the Sei network, offering transaction lookup, contract verification, and token analytics.

name: Kaiascan
description: Kaiascan is the official block explorer for the Kaia (formerly Klaytn) blockchain, covering transactions, blocks, accounts, and smart contracts.

name: Harmony Explorer
description: Harmony Explorer is the official block explorer for the Harmony blockchain, providing data on transactions, blocks, staking, and smart contracts.

name: Arbiscan
description: Arbiscan is the leading blockchain explorer for Arbitrum One, providing transaction history, smart contract data, token transfers, and gas analytics.

name: Optimistic Etherscan
description: Optimistic Etherscan is the primary block explorer for the Optimism network, offering full transaction, contract, and token visibility.

name: BaseScan
description: BaseScan is the leading blockchain explorer for Base, Coinbase's Ethereum L2 network, providing transaction lookup, smart contract verification, and token analytics.

name: Blastscan
description: Blastscan is the official block explorer for the Blast network, an Ethereum L2 with native yield for ETH and stablecoins.

name: MantleScan
description: MantleScan is the official block explorer for Mantle Network, an Ethereum L2 built with modular architecture.

name: Metis Explorer
description: Metis Explorer is the official block explorer for the Metis Andromeda L2 network, providing transaction and smart contract data.

name: Bobascan
description: Bobascan is the official block explorer for Boba Network, an Ethereum L2 focused on fast exits and hybrid compute.

name: zkSync Explorer
description: zkSync Explorer is the official block explorer for zkSync Era, a ZK rollup developed by Matter Labs, supporting transactions, tokens, and smart contracts.

name: Starkscan
description: Starkscan is a leading block explorer for Starknet, a ZK rollup on Ethereum, supporting transactions, contracts, tokens, and Cairo classes.

name: Voyager
description: Voyager is an alternative Starknet block explorer developed by Nethermind, providing transaction lookup, contract verification, and network analytics.

name: Lineascan
description: Lineascan is the official block explorer for Linea, a ZK rollup developed by ConsenSys, offering transaction and smart contract data.

name: Scrollscan
description: Scrollscan is the official block explorer for Scroll, a ZK rollup on Ethereum, providing full transaction, contract, and token analytics.

name: Gnosisscan
description: Gnosisscan is the primary block explorer for Gnosis Chain (formerly xDai), providing transaction history, smart contract data, and token analytics.

name: Cronoscan
description: Cronoscan is the leading block explorer for the Cronos blockchain, the EVM-compatible chain developed by Crypto.com.

name: Moonscan
description: Moonscan is the primary block explorer for Moonbeam, a Polkadot parachain providing full Ethereum compatibility.

name: Moonriver Moonscan
description: Moonriver Moonscan is the block explorer for Moonriver, the Kusama-based canary network of Moonbeam.

name: Celoscan
description: Celoscan is the leading block explorer for the Celo network, an EVM-compatible blockchain focused on mobile-first DeFi.

name: Aurora Explorer
description: Aurora Explorer is the official block explorer for Aurora, an EVM environment running on the NEAR Protocol.
